---
description: >
  Always-on standards for the Requirements Loop.
  Ensures structured, traceable requirements that feed both human review and agent workflows.
applyTo: "**"
---

# Requirements Loop Standards

## Input expectations

- Raw requirements come from meeting minutes, transcripts, or stakeholder notes.
- Always reference the original source when refining.

## Output expectations

- Every refined requirement must have: summary, acceptance criteria, affected scope, and priority.
- Use GitHub Issues as the canonical format — one issue per requirement.
- Link related issues to maintain traceability.

## Quality gates

- A human (Product Owner or Business Analyst) must review and approve every refined requirement before it enters the implementation backlog.
- Acceptance criteria must be testable and unambiguous.
